comment.body:
I bet. One time on my previous substack I had on (only one at a time) there was a guy who I thought was a great teacher. Had signals written by himself with 20y of exp, daily, hourly, 15min, you name it. 
He helped me to learn how to take less trades, but he couldn't use his own signals in the end. Usually was unsuccessfully trying for reversion. And he had some magic pivots he wouldn't share. 

And I have figured them out on his discord. Tried them for a few months without telling so I was sure I was right. And it turned out.... He asked like 50$ for 50 and 200 5min smas xDDD
